productDisplayName: Nike Men's Solarsoft Thong Black Flip Flop
description: Usher in the summer with these uber cool flip flops from nike. The soft ridged footbed lends itself to maximum comfort and the lightly ridged soles offer light grip. Perfect for a day out at the beach or poolside, simply team them with casuals and pamper your feet with a pleasure called comfort.Upper Thong straps in soft thermoplastic rubberfor extended durabilityRubber toe separator with small ridges to avoid blistering between the toesThong strap with rubber panel embedded brand mark for styleReplaceable thong straps inserted into the outsole through the midsole Midsole SolarSoft foam at midsole with grooves for airflow and drainageRidged footbed for maximum acupressure comfortSqueezable footbed offering ultimate lightweight feel Outsole Made of 1mm thick water-proof and tear resistant premium silicone skin Firm SolarSoft foam at outsole for durability and traction shoe careWipe surface using a damp clean cloth to remove dust
